questionHtml: Lucy asserts that the number of hours a student practises has a direct effect on their final diploma result. Comment on the validity of Lucy’s assertion.
markschemeHtml:
Lucy is incorrect in suggesting there is a causal relationship.

This might be true, but the data can only indicate a correlation.                     R1


Note: Accept ‘Lucy is incorrect as correlation does not imply causation’ or equivalent.


[1 mark]

meta.title: Lucy asserts that the number of hours a student practises has a direct effect on their final diploma result. Comment on the validity of Lucy’s assertion.
